---
title: "No Parse Errors"
output: html_document
---

This is not executable R code:

``` r
library(dplyr

a <- 1 + 1
```

But this is:

```{r}
# C1: this should give no parse error

a <- 2 + 2
```

```{r, eval = FALSE}
# C2: this should give no parse error because it's not evaluated

a <- 3  3
```
